description: Research-only forecasting validation contract. This file defines deterministic opportunity construction, censoring, baselines, transparent candidates, evaluation metrics and product-promotion gates. It does not authorize production predictions by itself.

reply_within_horizon.definition: At the end of a participant turn, estimate whether a different participant begins a future turn within the specified horizon.
reply_within_horizon.group_chat_definition: For group chats this is only time until any different participant next speaks, not a specific reply attribution.

conditional_reply_delay_bucket.definition: Among opportunities with an observed future response, estimate the response-delay bucket. This is conditional timing among observed responses, not reply probability.

next_window_activity.definition: Using completed adaptive windows only, estimate the next completed window's messages per active day.

initiation_reconnection.reason: Not implemented for product validation in Stage 5 because sample sizes and independent observations are likely insufficient.

censoring_policy.historical_export_limitation: An export can end before the real-world conversation ended; export-end opportunities are treated according to observed export coverage only.

safety_wording.not_validated: Forecasting is not validated for this export.
safety_wording.no_motive: A forecast is an estimate from previous observable behavior, not knowledge of intent, affection, attachment, personality or relationship status.
safety_wording.synthetic_limit: Synthetic fixtures validate correctness of the method, not real-world predictive validity.
